outfit_info.outfit_description: A crisp white bow-detail cotton poplin shirt is neatly tucked into a classic blue denim midi skirt. Rich burgundy leather ballet flats and a matching tote bag add a sophisticated contrast, creating an effortless yet polished casual ensemble perfect for spring or autumn days.

model_attributes.body: Slender and well-proportioned, the model presents a poised and graceful demeanor with a short bob haircut.
model_attributes.pose: Standing front-facing with arms slightly bent and hands relaxed, exuding a calm and confident presence.
model_attributes.background: A clean, minimalistic, and uniformly lit white studio background, highlighting the outfit without distractions.

styling_techniques.P00940006: Partially unbuttoned, Drawstring tie hanging loose, Tucked-in (front)
